message.content:
@startuml
participant "Specialist Doctor" as Doctor

participant ":CreateReportUI" as CreateReportUI

participant ":CreateReportController" as CreateReportController

participant ":Company" as Company

participant ":TestDiagnosis" as TestDiagnosis

participant "rp : TestReportStore" as TestReportStore

participant "obj : diagnosis" as objDiagnosis

participant "rp : TestReport" as rpTestReport

note right of CreateReportUI
  ref
  US4_SD_testsDTO.puml
end note

1..1
Doctor ->| asks to create a new diagnosis | CreateReportUI

CreateReportUI -> CreateReportUI : ref
CreateReportUI ..> CreateReportUI : US4_SD_testsDTO.puml

2..2
Doctor <-| requests to choose a given test | CreateReportUI

3..3
Doctor -> CreateReportUI : chooses a given test

4..4
CreateReportUI -> CreateReportController : createTestDiagnosis(idTest)

5..5
CreateReportController -> TestDiagnosis : createTestDiagnosis(test)

6..6
TestDiagnosis -> TestDiagnosis : createTestDiagnosis(testParameterList)
TestDiagnosis ..> TestDiagnosis : obj : diagnosis

7..7
TestDiagnosis <-| getDiagnosis() | CreateReportController

8..8
CreateReportController <-| getDiagnosis() | TestDiagnosis

9..9
CreateReportUI -> Doctor : shows the diagnosis done automatically and requests the data for the report

10..10
Doctor -> CreateReportUI : types the requested data

11..11
CreateReportUI -> CreateReportController : createReport(idTest, diagnosis, report)

12..12
CreateReportController -> Company : store = getTestReportStore()

13..13
CreateReportController -> TestReportStore : createReport(idTest, diagnosis, report)

14..14
TestReportStore -> TestReport : create(idTest, diagnosis, report)

15..15
CreateReportController -> TestReportStore : validateReport()

16..16
TestReportStore <-| shows the typed data and asks for confirmation | CreateReportController

17..17
Doctor -> CreateReportUI : confirms the data

18..18
CreateReportUI -> CreateReportController : saveReport(report)

19..19
CreateReportController -> Company : saveReport(report)

20..20
Company -> TestReportStore : saveReport(report)

21..21
TestReportStore -> TestReport : validateReport(report)

22..22
TestReportStore -> TestReport : addReport(report)

23..23
CreateReportUI <-| informs operation success | Doctor
@enduml
